name: Painbow
description: Notes A unique trap in that the Painbow’s explosion can begin from anywhere within 1 tile of the trap’s placement. This is also the only trap to have a random explosion radius of 1-4, with all other traps explosion radius’ being a set value.

stats.damage: 10-60 (35) per pulse (120-720 (420) total); 1 pulse per 1.2 seconds (12 total)
